description: Letter from Yeshuʿa to his father Saʿīd. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 14th century or later, based on handwriting and abbreviations used. This letter was written around the period of the High Holidays. Perhaps this is why Yeshuʿa asks his father to forgive him. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב מישועה לאביו סעיד. ביהודית-ערבית. תאריך: ככל הנראה המאה ה-14 ואילך. נכתב סביב חגי תשרי. ישועה מבקש סליחה מאביו. דרוש עיון נוסף.
